files.diff:
diff --git a/sim_notes.md b/sim_notes.md
index 6961ca6..e073f54 100644
--- a/sim_notes.md
+++ b/sim_notes.md
@@ -399,2 +399,7 @@ Day 420 / Week 60 observations:
 - Remaining base is entirely S2 C. Churn is still high, but acquisition is gone and the remaining quality buffer is very large.
 - Week 60 adjustment: lower C to model tier 2 and B to tier 1 so C remains the premium quality plan while C compute cost falls by two-thirds versus tier 3. Tighten quotas to A=2.5k/B=7.5k/C=10k, keep capacity tier 3, cut ops to $2.5k/day, and keep dev/ad/promotions off.
+
+Day 427 / Week 61 observations:
+- Cash is $1.63M. Subscribers fell to 1,849 and usage fell to 3.9M/week, below tier-2 weekly capacity.
+- Remaining base is all S2 C. The business is nearly fully run off; revenue is billing-timing dependent and the main controllable factor is avoiding unnecessary fixed/compute spend.
+- Week 61 adjustment: move all plans to model tier 1, cut quotas to A=1k/B=5k/C=5k, move capacity to tier 2, cut ops to $1k/day, and keep dev/ad/promotions off.
